---
title: "ALD_FDA_Dissertation"
author: "Suryadyuti Baral"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

### GF

```{r}
library(data.table)
ald_dat <- fread("~/FDA_with_accelerated_longitudinal_designs/dissertation_dat/Dissertation_Selection.csv", na.strings = ".")

# Setup
response_vars <- c("GF1", "GF2")
time_vars <- c("age1", "age2")

# Remove rows where any age < 5 and >27
valid_indices <- apply(ald_dat[, ..time_vars], 1, function(row) all(is.na(row) | row >= 5 & row <= 27))
ald_dat <- ald_dat[valid_indices]

# Construct Lt and Ly using lapply (with -500 shift)
tmp <- lapply(1:nrow(ald_dat), function(i) {
  y <- unlist(ald_dat[i, ..response_vars])
  t <- unlist(ald_dat[i, ..time_vars])
  keep <- !(is.na(y) | is.na(t))
  list(Ly = y[keep] - 500, Lt = t[keep])
})
Ly <- lapply(tmp, `[[`, "Ly")
Lt <- lapply(tmp, `[[`, "Lt")

# Prepare for modeling
unique_ages <- sort(unique(unlist(Lt)))
first_fr_scores <- na.omit(sapply(Ly, function(y) if (length(y)) y[1] else NA))
sort(unique_ages)
```

```{r}
# Load model code
source("~/FDA_with_accelerated_longitudinal_designs/ldm.R")
source("~/FDA_with_accelerated_longitudinal_designs/kerFctn.R")
source("~/FDA_with_accelerated_longitudinal_designs/Rfunctions.R")

# Fit model with regular time grid
set.seed(1)
age <- 5:27
z02 <- generate_initial_values(Lt_list = Lt, Ly_list = Ly, age_grid = age, m = 4, method = "normal")
acd_fda_2 <- ldm(Ly, Lt, z02, age, optns = list(M = nrow(z02), cores = 24, regular = FALSE))

saveRDS(acd_fda_2, file = "~/FDA_with_accelerated_longitudinal_designs/dissertation_dat/GF_dissertation_ALD_sim_curves.rds")
```


```{r}
# 1. Round time names from rownames of Y_full
time_names <- round(seq(5,27, length.out = 23*12), 3)
x_rounded <- round(age, 3)
unique_times <- sort(unique(x_rounded))

# 2. For each unique time in age, find the first matching index in time_names
matching_indices <- sapply(unique_times, function(t) {
  match(t, time_names)  # match returns the first occurrence
})

# 5. Estimated trajectories from acd_fda$path
est_df <- as.data.frame(t(acd_fda_2$path)) %>%
  mutate(Time = age) %>%
  pivot_longer(-Time, names_to = "Subject", values_to = "y") %>%
  mutate(group = "Estimated")

# 6. (Optional) Observed snippets from sim_al_data$Ly
obs_df <- map2_dfr(Ly, Lt,
                   ~ tibble(Time = .y, y = .x),
                   .id = "Subject") %>%
  mutate(group = "Observed")

# 7. Combine all
df_all <- bind_rows(est_df, obs_df)

# 8. Plot
ggplot(df_all, aes(x = Time, y = y, group = Subject, color = group)) +
  geom_line(data = filter(df_all, group == "Estimated"), 
            alpha = 0.4, linewidth = 0.4) +
  geom_line(data = filter(df_all, group == "Observed"), 
            linewidth = 0.4) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Estimated" = "steelblue",
                                "Observed" = "red")) +
  labs(x = "Time", y = "Functional Value", color = "Trajectory Type",
       title = "Accelerated Longitudinal Sampling: \n True vs Estimated vs Observed") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14)
```


```{r}
results <- evaluate_simulations(tfine = seq(5,27, length.out = 23*12), sim_al_data = list(Ly = Ly, Lt = Lt), sim_data = NULL, acd_fda_2 = acd_fda_2, plot = TRUE)
```


```{r eval=FALSE, include=FALSE}
library(fdapace)
library(fda)

curve_matrix <- as.matrix(acd_fda_2$path)
age_grid <- 5:27
Lt_age <- replicate(nrow(curve_matrix), age_grid, simplify = FALSE)
Ly <- split(curve_matrix, row(curve_matrix))
fpca_acd<-FPCA(Ly, Lt_age)
plot(fpca_acd)

curve_matrix <- as.matrix(acd_fda$path)
Lt_age <- replicate(nrow(curve_matrix), age_grid, simplify = FALSE)
Ly <- split(curve_matrix, row(curve_matrix))
fpca_acd1<-FPCA(Ly, Lt_age)
plot(fpca_acd1)
```


### GAK
```{r}
ald_dat <- fread("C:/Users/sonnet/Box/FDA/Emilio_dissertation/Dissertation_Selection.csv", na.strings = ".")
response_vars <- c("GAK1", "GAK2")

# Remove rows where any age < 5 and >27
valid_indices <- apply(ald_dat[, ..time_vars], 1, function(row) all(is.na(row) | row >= 5 & row <= 27))
ald_dat <- ald_dat[valid_indices]

# Construct Lt and Ly using lapply (with -500 shift)
tmp <- lapply(1:nrow(ald_dat), function(i) {
  y <- unlist(ald_dat[i, ..response_vars])
  t <- unlist(ald_dat[i, ..time_vars])
  keep <- !(is.na(y) | is.na(t))
  list(Ly = y[keep] - 500, Lt = t[keep])
})
Ly <- lapply(tmp, `[[`, "Ly")
Lt <- lapply(tmp, `[[`, "Lt")

# Prepare for modeling
unique_ages <- sort(unique(unlist(Lt)))
first_fr_scores <- na.omit(sapply(Ly, function(y) if (length(y)) y[1] else NA))
sort(unique_ages)
```

```{r}
# Fit model with regular time grid
set.seed(1)
age <- 5:27
z02 <- generate_initial_values(Lt_list = Lt, Ly_list = Ly, age_grid = age, m = 4, method = "normal")
acd_fda_2 <- ldm(Ly, Lt, z02, age, optns = list(M = nrow(z02), cores = 24, regular = FALSE))

saveRDS(acd_fda_2, file = "~/FDA_with_accelerated_longitudinal_designs/dissertation_dat/GAK_dissertation_ALD_sim_curves.rds")
```


```{r}
# 1. Round time names from rownames of Y_full
time_names <- round(seq(5,27, length.out = 23*12), 3)
x_rounded <- round(age, 3)
unique_times <- sort(unique(x_rounded))

# 2. For each unique time in age, find the first matching index in time_names
matching_indices <- sapply(unique_times, function(t) {
  match(t, time_names)  # match returns the first occurrence
})

# 5. Estimated trajectories from acd_fda$path
est_df <- as.data.frame(t(acd_fda_2$path)) %>%
  mutate(Time = age) %>%
  pivot_longer(-Time, names_to = "Subject", values_to = "y") %>%
  mutate(group = "Estimated")

# 6. (Optional) Observed snippets from sim_al_data$Ly
obs_df <- map2_dfr(Ly, Lt,
                   ~ tibble(Time = .y, y = .x),
                   .id = "Subject") %>%
  mutate(group = "Observed")

# 7. Combine all
df_all <- bind_rows(est_df, obs_df)

# 8. Plot
ggplot(df_all, aes(x = Time, y = y, group = Subject, color = group)) +
  geom_line(data = filter(df_all, group == "Estimated"), 
            alpha = 0.4, linewidth = 0.4) +
  geom_line(data = filter(df_all, group == "Observed"), 
            linewidth = 0.4) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Estimated" = "steelblue",
                                "Observed" = "red")) +
  labs(x = "Time", y = "Functional Value", color = "Trajectory Type",
       title = "Accelerated Longitudinal Sampling: \n True vs Estimated vs Observed") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14)
```


```{r}
results <- evaluate_simulations(tfine = seq(5,27, length.out = 23*12), sim_al_data = list(Ly = Ly, Lt = Lt), sim_data = NULL, acd_fda_2 = acd_fda_2, plot = TRUE)
```

```{r eval=FALSE, include=FALSE}
library(fdapace)
library(fda)

curve_matrix <- as.matrix(acd_fda_2$path)
age_grid <- 5:27
Lt_age <- replicate(nrow(curve_matrix), age_grid, simplify = FALSE)
Ly <- split(curve_matrix, row(curve_matrix))
fpca_acd<-FPCA(Ly, Lt_age)
plot(fpca_acd)

curve_matrix <- as.matrix(acd_fda$path)
Lt_age <- replicate(nrow(curve_matrix), age_grid, simplify = FALSE)
Ly <- split(curve_matrix, row(curve_matrix))
fpca_acd1<-FPCA(Ly, Lt_age)
plot(fpca_acd1)
```


### GC
```{r}
ald_dat <- fread("C:/Users/sonnet/Box/FDA/Emilio_dissertation/Dissertation_Selection.csv", na.strings = ".")
response_vars <- c("GC1", "GC2")

# Remove rows where any age < 5 and >27
valid_indices <- apply(ald_dat[, ..time_vars], 1, function(row) all(is.na(row) | row >= 5 & row <= 27))
ald_dat <- ald_dat[valid_indices]

# Construct Lt and Ly using lapply (with -500 shift)
tmp <- lapply(1:nrow(ald_dat), function(i) {
  y <- unlist(ald_dat[i, ..response_vars])
  t <- unlist(ald_dat[i, ..time_vars])
  keep <- !(is.na(y) | is.na(t))
  list(Ly = y[keep] - 500, Lt = t[keep])
})
Ly <- lapply(tmp, `[[`, "Ly")
Lt <- lapply(tmp, `[[`, "Lt")

# Prepare for modeling
unique_ages <- sort(unique(unlist(Lt)))
first_fr_scores <- na.omit(sapply(Ly, function(y) if (length(y)) y[1] else NA))
sort(unique_ages)
```

```{r}
# Fit model with regular time grid
set.seed(1)
age <- 5:27
z02 <- generate_initial_values(Lt_list = Lt, Ly_list = Ly, age_grid = age, m = 4, method = "normal")
acd_fda_2 <- ldm(Ly, Lt, z02, age, optns = list(M = nrow(z02), cores = 24, regular = FALSE))

saveRDS(acd_fda_2, file = "~/FDA_with_accelerated_longitudinal_designs/dissertation_dat/GC_dissertation_ALD_sim_curves.rds")
```


```{r}
# 1. Round time names from rownames of Y_full
time_names <- round(seq(5,27, length.out = 23*12), 3)
x_rounded <- round(age, 3)
unique_times <- sort(unique(x_rounded))

# 2. For each unique time in age, find the first matching index in time_names
matching_indices <- sapply(unique_times, function(t) {
  match(t, time_names)  # match returns the first occurrence
})

# 5. Estimated trajectories from acd_fda$path
est_df <- as.data.frame(t(acd_fda_2$path)) %>%
  mutate(Time = age) %>%
  pivot_longer(-Time, names_to = "Subject", values_to = "y") %>%
  mutate(group = "Estimated")

# 6. (Optional) Observed snippets from sim_al_data$Ly
obs_df <- map2_dfr(Ly, Lt,
                   ~ tibble(Time = .y, y = .x),
                   .id = "Subject") %>%
  mutate(group = "Observed")

# 7. Combine all
df_all <- bind_rows(est_df, obs_df)

# 8. Plot
ggplot(df_all, aes(x = Time, y = y, group = Subject, color = group)) +
  geom_line(data = filter(df_all, group == "Estimated"), 
            alpha = 0.4, linewidth = 0.4) +
  geom_line(data = filter(df_all, group == "Observed"), 
            linewidth = 0.4) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Estimated" = "steelblue",
                                "Observed" = "red")) +
  labs(x = "Time", y = "Functional Value", color = "Trajectory Type",
       title = "Accelerated Longitudinal Sampling: \n True vs Estimated vs Observed") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14)
```


```{r}
results <- evaluate_simulations(tfine = seq(5,27, length.out = 23*12), sim_al_data = list(Ly = Ly, Lt = Lt), sim_data = NULL, acd_fda_2 = acd_fda_2, plot = TRUE)
```

```{r eval=FALSE, include=FALSE}
library(fdapace)
library(fda)

curve_matrix <- as.matrix(acd_fda_2$path)
age_grid <- 5:27
Lt_age <- replicate(nrow(curve_matrix), age_grid, simplify = FALSE)
Ly <- split(curve_matrix, row(curve_matrix))
fpca_acd<-FPCA(Ly, Lt_age, list(useBinnedData = "OFF"))
plot(fpca_acd)

curve_matrix <- as.matrix(acd_fda$path)
Lt_age <- replicate(nrow(curve_matrix), age_grid, simplify = FALSE)
Ly <- split(curve_matrix, row(curve_matrix))
fpca_acd1<-FPCA(Ly, Lt_age, list(useBinnedData = "OFF"))
plot(fpca_acd1)
```


### GQ
```{r}
ald_dat <- fread("C:/Users/sonnet/Box/FDA/Emilio_dissertation/Dissertation_Selection.csv", na.strings = ".")
response_vars <- c("GQ1", "GQ2")

# Remove rows where any age < 5 and >27
valid_indices <- apply(ald_dat[, ..time_vars], 1, function(row) all(is.na(row) | row >= 5 & row <= 22))
ald_dat <- ald_dat[valid_indices]

# Construct Lt and Ly using lapply (with -500 shift)
tmp <- lapply(1:nrow(ald_dat), function(i) {
  y <- unlist(ald_dat[i, ..response_vars])
  t <- unlist(ald_dat[i, ..time_vars])
  keep <- !(is.na(y) | is.na(t))
  list(Ly = y[keep] - 500, Lt = t[keep])
})
Ly <- lapply(tmp, `[[`, "Ly")
Lt <- lapply(tmp, `[[`, "Lt")

# Prepare for modeling
unique_ages <- sort(unique(unlist(Lt)))
first_fr_scores <- na.omit(sapply(Ly, function(y) if (length(y)) y[1] else NA))
sort(unique_ages)
```

```{r}
# Fit model with regular time grid
set.seed(1)
age <- 5:22
z02 <- generate_initial_values(Lt_list = Lt, Ly_list = Ly, age_grid = age, m = 4, method = "normal")
acd_fda_2 <- ldm(Ly, Lt, z02, age, optns = list(M = nrow(z02), cores = 24, regular = FALSE))

saveRDS(acd_fda_2, file = "~/FDA_with_accelerated_longitudinal_designs/dissertation_dat/GQ_dissertation_ALD_sim_curves.rds")
```


```{r}
# 1. Round time names from rownames of Y_full
time_names <- round(seq(5,22, length.out = 18*12), 3)
x_rounded <- round(age, 3)
unique_times <- sort(unique(x_rounded))

# 2. For each unique time in age, find the first matching index in time_names
matching_indices <- sapply(unique_times, function(t) {
  match(t, time_names)  # match returns the first occurrence
})

# 5. Estimated trajectories from acd_fda$path
est_df <- as.data.frame(t(acd_fda_2$path)) %>%
  mutate(Time = age) %>%
  pivot_longer(-Time, names_to = "Subject", values_to = "y") %>%
  mutate(group = "Estimated")

# 6. (Optional) Observed snippets from sim_al_data$Ly
obs_df <- map2_dfr(Ly, Lt,
                   ~ tibble(Time = .y, y = .x),
                   .id = "Subject") %>%
  mutate(group = "Observed")

# 7. Combine all
df_all <- bind_rows(est_df, obs_df)

# 8. Plot
ggplot(df_all, aes(x = Time, y = y, group = Subject, color = group)) +
  geom_line(data = filter(df_all, group == "Estimated"), 
            alpha = 0.4, linewidth = 0.4) +
  geom_line(data = filter(df_all, group == "Observed"), 
            linewidth = 0.4) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Estimated" = "steelblue",
                                "Observed" = "red")) +
  labs(x = "Time", y = "Functional Value", color = "Trajectory Type",
       title = "Accelerated Longitudinal Sampling: \n True vs Estimated vs Observed") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14)
```


```{r}
results <- evaluate_simulations(tfine = seq(5,22, length.out = 18*12), sim_al_data = list(Ly = Ly, Lt = Lt), sim_data = NULL, acd_fda_2 = acd_fda_2, plot = TRUE)
```

```{r eval=FALSE, include=FALSE}
library(fdapace)
library(fda)

curve_matrix <- as.matrix(acd_fda_2$path)
age_grid <- 5:27
Lt_age <- replicate(nrow(curve_matrix), age_grid, simplify = FALSE)
Ly <- split(curve_matrix, row(curve_matrix))
fpca_acd<-FPCA(Ly, Lt_age)
plot(fpca_acd)

curve_matrix <- as.matrix(acd_fda$path)
Lt_age <- replicate(nrow(curve_matrix), age_grid, simplify = FALSE)
Ly <- split(curve_matrix, row(curve_matrix))
fpca_acd1<-FPCA(Ly, Lt_age)
plot(fpca_acd1)
```
